case_title: RUSSELL BRIMER VS. WALONG MARKETING INC et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

INJUNCTIVE RELIEF, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRIMER, RUSSELL AS TO DEFENDANT WALONG MARKETING INC DOES 1 THROUGH 150 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-14-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-17-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-29-2006

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-28-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUL-14-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRIMER, RUSSELL SERVED MAR-01-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WALONG MARKETING INC
